title.zh-TW: 連向封存節點的邊會自動衰減
title.en: 甇豢?蝭暺???鋡急楚??Edges Connected to Archived Nodes Are Faded

body.zh-TW: 所有連向已封存節點的邊，其外觀會自動變為「衰減」狀態，但不會從資料庫中刪除。
body.en: ?????唳飛瑼?暺????楚?＊蝷綽?雿??◤?芷??All edges linked to an archived node are automatically faded in appearance but are not deleted from the database.
